message:
feat(cli,serve): add --robot-digest flag and refactor attention stream preparation

CLI:
- Add --robot-digest flag for non-blocking attention feed digest
- Wire flag to robot.PrintDigest with profile and cursor support
- Fixes discrepancy where digest was documented in capabilities but not implemented

Serve:
- Extract prepareAttentionStream() for modular stream setup
- Add attentionStreamFeed interface for testability
- Add filterAttentionReplayBoundary() to prevent duplicate events
- Handle cursor expiry with proper cleanup (unsubscribe before error return)

Tests:
- Add TestPrepareAttentionStream_ReplayBoundaryPreservesLiveEvents
- Add TestPrepareAttentionStream_CursorExpired
- Add fakeAttentionStreamFeed test helper

The attention stream refactoring ensures:
1. Replay events are bounded to prevent processing events that arrive
   during replay setup (race condition fix)
2. Proper resource cleanup on cursor expiry
3. Testable stream preparation logic

Closes: br-rkh17

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
